prompt: Finance escalated two checkout complaints and they both smell like the same class of bug. Customers whose carts total exactly $50.00 — our free-shipping threshold — are being charged the $6.95 flat rate anyway. A $49.99 cart correctly pays shipping, a $60.00 cart is correctly free; it's the carts that land right ON the threshold that get stung, and only some of them, depending on the line items. Meanwhile AR reports invoices paid in full through installments (e.g. $100.11 settled as three payments of $33.37) sit in the 'unsettled' bucket forever, even though outstanding() agrees $0.00 is owed. python3 test_pricing.py fails on both. Fix pricing.py without editing the test file and run it to confirm.
